name: example-html-ppt-presenter-mode-reveal
title: Html Ppt Presenter Mode Reveal
description: 演讲者模式专用 deck — tokyo-night 默认主题，5 套主题 T 键切换，每页带 150-300 字逐字稿示例（<aside class="notes">），按 S 打开 popup（CURRENT / NEXT / SCRIPT / TIMER 四张磁吸卡片）。用于技术分享、公开演讲、课程讲解，怕忘词或要提词器的场景。

query.en: Use the html-ppt-presenter-mode template to create a talk deck with speaker notes. First confirm the talk topic, duration (2-3 minutes per slide), and target audience. Then write 150-300 words of conversational presenter notes per slide (prompting signals, not a manuscript), with the presenter popup available via the S key.
query.zh-CN: 用 html-ppt-presenter-mode 模板做一份带逐字稿的演讲 PPT。先确认：演讲主题、时长（每页 2-3 分钟）、目标听众。然后帮我每页写 150-300 字的口语化逐字稿（不是讲稿，是提示信号），按 S 能打开 presenter 弹窗。
